narrative:
Marysville 8 (precinct in Union County) has 837 registered voters, with 46.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.2 percentage points.
